sentences.arabic: كَانَ هُنَاكَ رَجُلٌ حَكِيمٌ يَعِيشُ فِي قَرْيَةٍ صَغِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Bio je jedan mudar čovjek koji je živio u malom selu.
sentences.translationEn: There was a wise man living in a small village.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ إِلَيْهِ شَابٌّ وَسَأَلَهُ عَنْ سِرِّ النَّجَاحِ فِي الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Došao mu je jedan mladić i upitao ga za tajnu uspjeha u životu.
sentences.translationEn: A young man came to him and asked about the secret of success in life.

sentences.arabic: ابْتَسَمَ الْحَكِيمُ وَقَالَ: "النَّجَاحُ يَأْتِي بِالْعَمَلِ وَالصَّبْرِ".
sentences.translation: Mudrac se nasmiješio i rekao: "Uspjeh dolazi radom i strpljenjem."
sentences.translationEn: The wise man smiled and said: 'Success comes through work and patience.'

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الشَّابُّ دَرْساً مُهِمّاً وَبَدَأَ يَعْمَلُ بِجِدٍّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Mladić je naučio važnu lekciju i počeo je svakodnevno vrijedno raditi.
sentences.translationEn: The young man learned an important lesson and began to work hard every day.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْقِصَّةُ تُعَلِّمُنَا أَنَّ الْحِكْمَةَ تَكُونُ فِي الْأَفْعَالِ لَا فِي الْأَقْوَالِ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Ova priča nas uči da je mudrost u djelima, a ne samo u riječima.
sentences.translationEn: This story teaches us that wisdom is in actions, not just in words.
